rows.title: Lennox SL28XCV Variable-Capacity Air Conditioner
rows.description: The most efficient air conditioner Lennox offers, with up to 28.00 SEER / 28.00 SEER2 variable-capacity cooling, SilentComfort technology, and iComfort-enabled diagnostics.

rows.title: Lennox SL25KCV High-Efficiency Air Conditioner
rows.description: High-efficiency variable-capacity air conditioner with up to 25.00 SEER2, low-GWP refrigerant option, digital-ready design, and ultra-quiet operation.

rows.title: Lennox XC21 Variable-Capacity Air Conditioner
rows.description: Variable-capacity air conditioner with up to 21.00 SEER, true variable-capacity operation, iComfort-enabled, and as low as 65 dB sound rating.

rows.title: Lennox XC20 Variable-Capacity Air Conditioner
rows.description: Variable-capacity air conditioner with up to 20.00 SEER, as low as 65 dB, iComfort-enabled, and ENERGY STAR Most Efficient certified.

rows.title: Lennox EL23XCV Central Air Conditioner
rows.description: High-efficiency variable-capacity air conditioner with up to 23.00 SEER2, ENERGY STAR Most Efficient certified, iComfort-enabled, and quiet operation.

rows.title: Lennox EL22KCV Energy Efficient Air Conditioner
rows.description: Energy-efficient variable-capacity air conditioner with up to 22.00 SEER2, low-GWP R-454B refrigerant, digital-ready, and quiet performance.

rows.title: Lennox EL18XCV Air Conditioner
rows.description: Variable-speed air conditioner with up to 18.00 SEER / 17.50 SEER2, iComfort-enabled, compact design for optimized comfort.

rows.title: Lennox EL18KCV Most Efficient Air Conditioner
rows.description: Most efficient Elite air conditioner with up to 19.50 SEER2, variable-capacity cooling, low-GWP R-454B refrigerant, and quiet operation.
rows.features: ["variable-capacity scroll compressor","low-GWP R-454B refrigerant","high-efficiency outdoor coil"]

rows.title: Lennox EL17XC1 Air Conditioner
rows.description: Single-stage air conditioner with up to 17.00 SEER / 16.20 SEER2, scroll compressor, and reliable cooling performance.

rows.title: Lennox EL16XC1 Air Conditioner
rows.description: Single-stage air conditioner with up to 17.00 SEER / 16.00 SEER2, scroll compressor, as low as 71 dB noise, and ENERGY STAR certified.

rows.title: Lennox EL16KC1 Energy Efficient Air Conditioner
rows.description: Single-stage air conditioner with up to 17.00 SEER2, low-GWP R-454B refrigerant, quiet operation, and ENERGY STAR certified.

rows.title: Lennox EL15KC1 Efficient Air Conditioner
rows.description: Single-stage air conditioner with up to 16.00 SEER2, low-GWP R-454B refrigerant, quiet cooling, and ENERGY STAR certified.

rows.title: Lennox ML18XC2 Two-Stage Air Conditioner
rows.description: Two-stage air conditioner with up to 18.00 SEER / 17.80 SEER2, providing quiet, even cooling with improved humidity control.

rows.title: Lennox ML17XC1 Single-Stage Air Conditioner
rows.description: Single-stage air conditioner with up to 18.00 SEER / 17.00 SEER2, scroll compressor, reliable and cost-effective cooling.

rows.title: Lennox ML17KC2 Two-Stage Air Conditioner
rows.description: Two-stage air conditioner with up to 17.00 SEER2, low-GWP R-454B refrigerant, delivering quiet and balanced cooling.

rows.title: Lennox ML14XC1 Air Conditioner
rows.description: Single-stage air conditioner with up to 16.00 SEER / 15.20 SEER2, scroll compressor, reliable performance at an affordable price.

rows.title: Lennox ML14KC1 Affordable Air Conditioner
rows.description: Single-stage air conditioner with up to 15.20 SEER2, low-GWP R-454B refrigerant, providing affordable and reliable cooling.

rows.title: Lennox ML13KC1 Single-Stage Air Conditioner
rows.description: Entry-level single-stage air conditioner with up to 14.30 SEER2, low-GWP R-454B refrigerant, and reliable basic cooling.

rows.title: Lennox 13ACX Single-Stage Air Conditioner
rows.description: Merit Series single-stage air conditioner with up to 15.50 SEER, scroll compressor, and basic reliable cooling for budget-conscious installations.

rows.title: Lennox 16ACX Two-Stage Air Conditioner
rows.description: Merit Series two-stage air conditioner with up to 17.00 SEER, as low as 74 dB sound, ENERGY STAR qualified, and Humiditrol compatible.

rows.title: Lennox XC13 Single-Stage Air Conditioner
rows.description: Elite Series single-stage air conditioner with up to 16.00 SEER, as low as 74 dB sound, ENERGY STAR qualified, and scroll compressor.
